watched.title: Joy
watched.review:
---


![[joy.jpeg]]

## Ключевые идеи
Фильм о невероятно доброй девушке, которая несмотря на все трудности преследовала свою цель, не забывая о морали и чести. Даже в самые сложные моменты, она помогала своим близким, хотя те не поддерживали героиню в трудную минуту, а наоборот -- мешали и говорили, что ничего не выйдет. Очевидно, они были неправы.  Все вокруг пытались ей навредить, кто-то случайно, а кто-то специально.
Джой, главная героиня, -- невероятная изобретательница. Ее невозможно остановить, она всегда идет вперед и в итоге добивается успеха. Получив известность, она продолжает помогать таким же изобретателям решать те проблемы, которые преследовали ее на пути. Джой полностью открыта миру и излучает только добро.

---
[[films resumes]]

watched.title: Человек, который изменил всё
watched.review:
---
## Ключевые идеи
"Человек, изменивший всё" — фильм, основанный на реальных событиях, про статистику и математику в игре бейсбол.

Бейсбольный клуб, имеющий скудное финансирование, нуждается в новшествах при наборе игроков. Без денег, по-другому им никак не достичь высот. 

Менеджер клуба находит молодого парня, который производит оценку игроков основываясь исключительно на статистике. Он находит спортсменов, имеющих хорошие показатели в нужных областях, но при этом сильно недооценённых при привычных методах набора команды. Вместе, они набирают таких людей, закрывая разные позиции. 

Никто не верит в эту систему, герои терпят много неудач. В основном, из-за ошибок тренера, который ведёт игру "по-старому". Так проигрывается игра за игрой. 
Но решая все трудности, получается поставить невероятный рекорд и выйти в финал. 

Герои мечтают и верят, что можно изменить положение дел. Доказать, что команды без большого финансирования, также могут достигать побед. Раньше это считалось невозможным, но у них действительно получилось.

watchlist.title: Dumb Money
watchlist.overview: Vlogger Keith Gill sinks his life savings into GameStop stock and posts about it. When social media starts blowing up, so do his life and the lives of everyone following him. As a stock tip becomes a movement, everyone gets rich—until the billionaires fight back, and both sides find their worlds turned upside down.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: Accidental Partners
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: Two women discover they were both scammed by the same man (who also got them pregnant). They form an alliance to take revenge.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: A highly rated catalog discovery outside your usual genre signals.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: Swapped
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: A small woodland creature and a majestic bird, two natural sworn enemies of the Valley, magically trade places and set off on an adventure of a lifetime to switch back. Their journey soon uncovers a greater threat—one that could endanger not only their species, but the entire valley they call home.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: A highly rated catalog discovery outside your usual genre signals.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: The Shawshank Redemption
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: Imprisoned in the 1940s for the double murder of his wife and her lover, upstanding banker Andy Dufresne begins a new life at the Shawshank prison, where he puts his accounting skills to work for an amoral warden. During his long stretch in prison, Dufresne comes to be admired by the other inmates -- including an older prisoner named Red -- for his integrity and unquenchable sense of hope.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: A highly rated catalog discovery outside your usual genre signals.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: Michael
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: The story of Michael Jackson, one of the most influential artists the world has ever known, and his life beyond the music. His journey from the discovery of his extraordinary talent as the lead of the Jackson Five, to the visionary artist whose creative ambition fueled a relentless pursuit to become the biggest entertainer in the world, highlighting both his life off-stage and some of the most iconic performances from his early solo career.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: A highly rated catalog discovery outside your usual genre signals.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: The Godfather
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: Spanning the years 1945 to 1955, a chronicle of the fictional Italian-American Corleone crime family. When organized crime family patriarch, Vito Corleone barely survives an attempt on his life, his youngest son, Michael steps in to take care of the would-be killers, launching a campaign of bloody revenge.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: A highly rated catalog discovery outside your usual genre signals.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: Project Hail Mary
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory returns, he begins to uncover his mission: solve the riddle of the mysterious substance causing the sun to die out. He must call on his scientific knowledge and unorthodox ideas to save everything on Earth from extinction.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: A highly rated catalog discovery outside your usual genre signals.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: The Godfather Part II
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: In the continuing saga of the Corleone crime family, a young Vito Corleone grows up in Sicily and in 1910s New York. In the 1950s, Michael Corleone attempts to expand the family business into Las Vegas, Hollywood and Cuba.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: A highly rated catalog discovery outside your usual genre signals.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: 12 Angry Men
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: The defense and the prosecution have rested and the jury is filing into the jury room to decide if a young Spanish-American is guilty or innocent of murdering his father. What begins as an open and shut case soon becomes a mini-drama of each of the jurors' prejudices and preconceptions about the trial, the accused, and each other.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: A highly rated catalog discovery outside your usual genre signals.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: Young Hearts
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: 14-year-old Elias increasingly feels like an outsider in his village. When he meets his new neighbour of the same age, Alexander, Elias is confronted with his burgeoning sexuality.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: A highly rated catalog discovery outside your usual genre signals.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: My Dearest Assassin
deterministicDiscoveries.originalTitle: เลือดรักนักฆ่า
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: Hunted for her rare blood type, a caged woman vows to fight alongside the assassin she loves to protect their future when an old enemy resurfaces.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: A highly rated catalog discovery outside your usual genre signals.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: Schindler's List
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: The true story of how businessman Oskar Schindler saved over a thousand Jewish lives from the Nazis while they worked as slaves in his factory during World War II.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: A highly rated catalog discovery outside your usual genre signals.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: Spirited Away
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: A young girl, Chihiro, becomes trapped in a strange new world of spirits. When her parents undergo a mysterious transformation, she must call upon the courage she never knew she had to free her family.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: A highly rated catalog discovery outside your usual genre signals.

aiDiscoveries.title: Petite Maman
aiDiscoveries.overview: A child exploring her mother's childhood home meets a girl building a treehouse nearby.
aiDiscoveries.rationale: Its compact story uses a quiet speculative idea to explore memory and family, echoing what you valued in Arrival and Moonlight.

aiDiscoveries.title: The Lives of Others
aiDiscoveries.overview: A surveillance officer becomes absorbed in the lives of the artists he monitors.
aiDiscoveries.rationale: The moral transformation is gradual and performance-led, with the emotional precision your reviews consistently reward.
